name: SARAJ HAMEED HAMEED
title: Program Management Professional
bio: Results-driven administrative and program management professional with 15+ years of experience across case management, international development, project coordination, data management, and customer service. Proven ability to manage high-volume caseloads, lead cross-functional teams, improve operational efficiency, and ensure compliance with organizational and donor requirements. Strong track record of delivering measurable outcomes in client services, program delivery, and process improvement.
